title: Simple Paxels
body:
This mod adds paxels.
Paxels are tools that lets you have 3 tools in 1.

There is a paxel for every Minecraft vanilla tier.

The durability is the sum of 3 tools used in crafting.

For now the crafting is
```
ASP
XsX
XsX
```
where 
A = axe, S = shovel, P = pickaxe, s = stick, X = nothing.

For now right click of this tools don't have interaction like axe log and shovel dirt.

Attack damage is 3x of material tier damage

Attack speed is for now nerfed to 0.07 

Netherite_paxel now can be crafted on smithing table from diamond_paxel with netherite upgrade
to keep its enchants

If you have a server
this mod requires to be installed client and server.


Credits: blacklight01 for screenshots and other mysterious things
